Title: Add promotion (name required)
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Navigate to Marketing > Promotions
2. Click 'Add'
3. Try to create without name > Verify required validation
4. Enter name > Create

Title: Edit promotion (name/description)
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Promotion exists [MKT-021]
Steps:
1. Edit promotion name > Save
2. Edit promotion description > Save

Title: Delete promotion
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Promotion exists
Steps:
1. Select promotion
2. Delete > Confirm

Title: Promotion Is Active toggle and storefront visibility
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Promotion exists with conditions
Steps:
1. Set Is Active = TRUE > Check storefront > Promotion visible
2. Set Is Active = FALSE > Check storefront > Promotion not visible

Title: Promotion start/expiration date validation
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Promotion exists
Steps:
1. Set start date in future > Check storefront > Not applied
2. Set start date in past > Check storefront > Applied
3. Set expiration in past > Check storefront > Not applied
4. Set expiration in future > Check storefront > Applied

Title: Promotion store scope
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Promotion exists
Multiple stores available
Steps:
1. Set promotion store to non-current store > Verify not visible
2. Set promotion store to current store > Verify visible

Title: Catalog conditions (category/product/currency)
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Promotion exists
Steps:
1. Set Category condition (fully, without subcategory, without items) > Verify
2. Set Product condition (SKU, name, full price) > Verify
3. Set Currency = USD with storefront EUR > Verify not applied
4. Set Currency = USD with storefront USD > Verify applied

Title: Catalog conditions (InStock and Cart subtotal quantities)
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Promotion exists
Steps:
1. InStock quantity: at least > Verify
2. InStock quantity: exactly > Verify
3. InStock quantity: less than or equals > Verify
4. InStock quantity: between > Verify
5. Cart subtotal: at least/exactly/less than/between > Verify

Title: Cart conditions (items/category/entry/payment/shipping)
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Promotion exists
Steps:
1. Cart items: at least/exactly/less than/between > Verify
2. Cart items with excluding items > Verify
3. Cart items of category > Verify
4. Cart items of entry > Verify
5. Payment type condition > Verify
6. Shipping type condition > Verify

Title: Effects: Cart subtotal discounts
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Promotion with conditions exists
Steps:
1. Get $X off cart subtotal > Verify discount
2. Get X% off cart subtotal not to exceed $Y > Verify discount and cap

Title: Effects: Entry and free item discounts
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Promotion with product conditions exists
Steps:
1. Get $X off > Verify
2. Get $X off Y items of entry > Verify
3. Get X% off not to exceed $Y > Verify
4. Get X% off for Y items not to exceed $Z > Verify
5. Get X free items of product > Verify
6. Complex: For X in every Y items get Z% off > Verify

Title: Effects: Shipping and payment method discounts
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Promotion with shipping/payment conditions
Steps:
1. Get $X off shipping > Verify
2. Get X% off shipping not to exceed $Y > Verify
3. Get $X off payment method > Verify
4. Get X% off payment method not to exceed $Y > Verify

Title: Stackable Combination Policy
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Two promotions configured
Steps:
1. Switch to CombineStackable policy (Settings)
2. Both promos 'Can be combined' > Verify both applied
3. Promo A combinable + Promo B exclusive > Verify only B
4. Promo A exclusive + Promo B combinable > Verify only A
5. Both exclusive > Verify higher priority wins

Title: Best Reward Policy
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Two promotions with different discounts
Steps:
1. Switch to BestReward policy (Settings)
2. Apply both promos to cart
3. Verify promo with biggest discount is applied

Title: Promotion priority comparison
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Two promotions with different priorities
Steps:
1. Equal priority: Regular user + cart subtotal > X > Verify free shipping
2. Equal priority: Regular user + cart subtotal < X > Verify no free shipping
3. Equal priority: First time buyer + cart subtotal > X > Verify discount + free shipping
4. Priority 1 > Priority 2: First time buyer scenarios > Verify higher priority applied first
5. Higher priority: Regular user scenarios

Title: Multi-store promotion selection and access
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Multiple stores exist
Steps:
1. Select 2 stores for promotion > Verify
2. Change promo with access to 1 store > Verify restrictions
3. Change promo with access to both stores > Verify full access

Title: Gift availability rules
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend and Storefront
Gift promotion configured
Steps:
1. Set gift product out of stock > Verify gift not available
2. Set Can be purchased = false > Verify gift not available
3. Set Visible = false > Verify gift not available

Title: Settings tooltips
Preconditions: Admin logged in to Backend
Steps:
1. Open Settings > Marketing blade
2. Verify all tooltips folded
3. Click tooltip for field1 > Verify unfolds
4. Click tooltip for field2 > Verify field2 unfolds, field1 folds
5. Click Hide > Verify all fold

Title: Promotion — Catalog Discount
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Catalog with products exists
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/marketing/promotions
2. Click Add and enter a promotion name
3. Set the promotion type to Catalog discount
4. Configure catalog condition: select a product category
5. Configure effect: set percentage discount (e.g., 10% off)
6. Set Is Active = TRUE and save the promotion
7. Open storefront and navigate to the targeted category
8. Verify product prices reflect the 10% discount
9. Verify products outside the category are not discounted

Title: Promotion — Cart Discount
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Products exist for cart testing
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/marketing/promotions
2. Click Add and enter a promotion name
3. Configure cart condition: set minimum cart subtotal (e.g., $50)
4. Configure effect: set fixed amount discount (e.g., $5 off cart subtotal)
5. Set Is Active = TRUE and save the promotion
6. Open storefront and add products totaling less than $50
7. Verify the cart discount is NOT applied
8. Add more products to exceed $50 subtotal
9. Verify the $5 discount is applied to the cart total

Title: Promotion — Coupon Code
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Promotion exists [MKT-021]
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/marketing/promotions
2. Open an existing promotion
3. Navigate to the Coupon management section
4. Click Add coupon and enter a unique coupon code (e.g., SAVE10)
5. Set max uses to 100 and max uses per user to 1
6. Save the coupon
7. Open storefront and add products to cart
8. Enter the coupon code at checkout
9. Verify the promotion discount is applied
10. Verify the coupon code appears in the order summary

Title: Promotion — Usage Limit
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Promotion with coupon exists [MKT-061]
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/marketing/promotions
2. Open a promotion with coupon
3. Edit the coupon and set Maximum uses number to 2
4. Set Maximum uses per user to 1
5. Save the coupon
6. Use the coupon code on storefront for User1 and complete checkout
7. Attempt to use the same coupon code again with User1
8. Verify the per-user limit is enforced
9. Use the coupon code with User2 to consume the global limit
10. Attempt a third usage and verify it is blocked

Title: Promotion — Date Range
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Promotion exists [MKT-021]
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/marketing/promotions
2. Open an existing promotion
3. Set Start date to yesterday and End date to next week
4. Set Is Active = TRUE and save
5. Verify promotion is active on storefront
6. Update End date to yesterday and save
7. Verify promotion is no longer active on storefront
8. Set Start date to tomorrow and End date to next week
9. Verify promotion is not yet active on storefront
10. Verify date range validation (end date must be after start date)

Title: Promotion — Stacking Rules
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Two active promotions exist with different effects
CombineStackable policy is set in Settings
Steps:
1. Navigate to ${BACK_URL}/marketing/promotions
2. Set Promotion1 as "Can be combined" (combinable)
3. Set Promotion2 as "Can be combined" (combinable)
4. On storefront verify both promotions are applied simultaneously
5. Set Promotion2 as "Exclusive" (cannot be combined)
6. Trigger both promotions on storefront
7. Verify only the exclusive promotion is applied
8. Set both promotions as exclusive
9. Verify only the higher-priority promotion is applied
10. Verify the stacking rule behavior matches the CombineStackable policy

Title: Promotion combination policy setting persistence
Preconditions:
Admin logged in to Backend
Two active promotions exist with different discount effects
Steps:
1. Navigate to Settings > Marketing
2. Locate the 'Promotion combination policy' setting
3. Note the current value (e.g., CombineStackable)
4. Change the value to 'BestReward'
5. Click Save
6. Close the Settings blade and reopen it
7. Verify the value persisted as 'BestReward'
8. On storefront: trigger both promotions in a cart
9. Verify only the promotion with the biggest discount is applied (BestReward behavior)
10. Return to Settings and switch back to 'CombineStackable'
11. Save and verify persistence
12. On storefront: trigger both combinable promotions
13. Verify both promotions are applied (CombineStackable behavior)
